signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Staked 70,000 ETH ($143M+), Reducing Sell Pressure Amid Record WETH Wallet Growth | YES | HIGH confi
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Staked 70,000 ETH ($143M+), Reducing Sell Pressure Amid Record WETH Wallet Growth | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][4]  
Ethereum shows confirmed early recovery signs in April 2026, with the Foundation's staking easing supply pressure, $11.6B net inflows into U.S. spot ETH ETFs (BlackRock at $6.5B AUM), and peak on-chain activity: 32,058 new WETH wallets (16x average) and 46,650 ac

signals.headline: What is confirmed:** The Cavaliers lead the first-round Eastern Conference series **2-0 against the Raptors** after a 11
signals.raw: What is confirmed:** The Cavaliers lead the first-round Eastern Conference series **2-0 against the Raptors** after a 115-105 victory in Game 2[1]. Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points) led Cleveland to their 12th consecutive playoff victory against Toronto[1][2].
matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers
